arts.ttl: Wolves vs Arsenal LIVE: Premier League updates, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha will be keen to prove a point amid Arsenal transfer rumours

arts.ttl: Arsenal in ‘SERIOUS TALKS’ to complete first major January transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal ’s January transfer window has been dominated by rumours of a striker signing but no actual action, but now Mikel Arteta’s side are poised to complete their first definite deal. In the meantime, the sale of Zinchenko is set to raise the club a fortune, with Atletico Madrid boss Diego Simeone targeting a move for the Ukraine international star, according to Florian Plettenberg .

arts.ttl: “Will win the league then” – Tottenham legend says Arsenal need to sign Newcastle United star
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur legend Les Ferdinand believes if Arsenal had Newcastle United’s Alexander Isak they would win the Premier League title. The Sweden international has been in impressive form for the Magpies this season and is currently seen by many as the No.1 centre-forward in the Premier League. arts.ttl: Wolves vs Arsenal – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal make the trip to Molineux this weekend to face a Wolves side flirting with relegation from the Premier League. The Gunners put themselves in a very favourable position to finish in the top eight of the Uefa Champions League in midweek by prevailing over Dinamo Zagreb. Although their injuries are not considered serious, William […] The post Wolves vs Arsenal – Match Preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs. Arsenal: Bizarre feat on line in Premier League fixture at Molineux
arts.sum: A bizarre feat could occur for a third time when Wolverhampton Wanderers play host to Arsenal in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea or Man Utd? Benjamin Sesko has already picked his next club
arts.sum: RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko is one of the most eligible players on the transfer market, but the Slovenia international already knows what club he wants to play for when he leaves the Bundesliga side. “Last summer when the project was pitched from Arsenal, Chelsea and Man United, Sesko picked Arsenal and then made a secondary choice of whether it was now or to stay at Leipzig,” football transfer news expert Ben Jacobs told Inside Gooners.

arts.ttl: Justin Kluivert says Arsenal player who’s only scored once this season is better than Alexis Sanchez

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'actively looking' to sign striker - Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says the club are "actively looking" to sign a striker in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: ‘Much higher than €25m’ – Wolves told they need off-market offer to have any chance
arts.sum: Real Betis’ Johnny Cardoso has been linked with a move to Wolverhampton Wanderers in the winter market. Saturday’s editions of ABC Sevilla and Mundo Deportivo have looked at Wolves’ chances of securing the midfielder’s services. The newspaper local to the La Liga side state Real Betis will not open the exit door for the 23-year-old The post ‘Much higher than €25m’ – Wolves told they need off-market offer to have any chance appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Wolves vs Arsenal kicks off at 3pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 2.30pm. Live text coverage of Wolves vs Arsenal is also being provided on Saturday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.
